title: astragalus angustifolius subsp. angustifolius
intro: Astragalus angustifolius subsp. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved milk-vetch, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus angustifolius subsp. angustifolius include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
